description: Negative fixtures: each MUST FAIL validation against its schema. Consumed by console/tests/test_managed_platform_schemas.py::test_invalid_examples_are_rejected. `version` selects the schema directory (defaults to v1alpha1).

cases.reason: entitlement signature must be ed25519, not sigstore-cosign
owner_access must be preserved and export_available true in every state
expired must pause premium agents/tasks and read-only additional users
public packages must be mirrorable, no Hub account, direct download
managed modality presupposes team/organization edition, not personal
